Q: The sum of the digits of a two-digit number is 10. If 18 is added to the number, the digits are reversed. Find the number.

A: Let the digits be x and y.

xy + 18 = yx

xy – yx = 18 - 10

xy – yx = 8

xy + yx = 18 + 10

xy + yx = 28

xy + yx = 28

xy = 28 - yx

xy = 28 - 8

xy = 20

So the number is 20.
